faq.title: Expense tracking questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about managing expenses.

receiptScanning.question: How does receipt scanning work?
receiptScanning.answer: Simply take a photo of your receipt with your phone or upload an image. Our AI-powered OCR technology extracts the vendor name, date, amount, and even suggests a category automatically.

multipleCategories.question: Can I track expenses for multiple categories?
multipleCategories.answer: Yes! You can create custom categories or use our pre-built ones like Travel, Office Supplies, Software, Meals, and more. Expenses are automatically categorized based on the vendor.

taxes.question: Will this help with my taxes?
taxes.answer: Absolutely. We automatically flag tax-deductible expenses and generate reports you can share with your accountant. You'll never miss a deduction again.

integration.question: How does this integrate with invoicing?
integration.answer: Expenses flow directly into your financial reports. When combined with invoicing, you get a complete picture of your business finances — income and expenses in one place.

budgets.question: Can I set spending budgets?
budgets.answer: Yes, you can set budgets for different expense categories and get alerts when you're approaching your limits. Great for keeping spending under control.

bestReceiptApp.question: What is the best receipt scanning app for small business?
bestReceiptApp.answer: Invoicemonk combines receipt scanning with full expense tracking and invoicing in one platform. Our AI-powered OCR captures vendor, amount, date, and category from any receipt — then automatically categorizes the expense and stores it for tax time. Unlike standalone scanners, everything flows into your invoicing and financial reports.

receiptAppSmallBiz.question: How does receipt scanning work for small business expense tracking?
receiptAppSmallBiz.answer: Snap a photo of any receipt with your phone. Our OCR technology reads the vendor name, date, amount, and even suggests a category. The expense is automatically created, categorized, and stored in the cloud — searchable and ready for tax deductions or accountant exports.

whatIs.question: What is expense tracking software?
whatIs.answer: Expense tracking software automates the process of recording, categorizing, and reporting business expenses. It replaces manual spreadsheets with features like receipt scanning, automatic categorization, and real-time spending insights.

receiptScanning.question: How does receipt scanning work?
receiptScanning.answer: Receipt scanning uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition) technology to photograph a receipt and automatically extract the vendor name, date, amount, and category. Simply snap a photo with your phone and the data is captured instantly.

categories.question: Can I track expenses by category?
categories.answer: Yes. Expense tracking software lets you organize spending into categories like travel, office supplies, software, and meals. You can use pre-built categories or create custom ones, and expenses are often auto-categorized based on the vendor.

taxHelp.question: Does expense tracking help with taxes?
taxHelp.answer: Absolutely. Expense tracking software automatically flags tax-deductible expenses and generates reports you can share with your accountant. This ensures you never miss a deduction and stay compliant with tax authorities.
